ddls:
CREATE TABLE "campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the crowdfunding campaign */,
  "blurb" TEXT /* Short description of the campaign */,
  "goal" REAL /* Funding goal for the campaign */,
  "pledged" REAL /* Total amount pledged to the campaign */,
  "average_donation" REAL /* Average donation amount */,
  "number_of_backers" INTEGER /* Number of backers supporting the campaign */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the campaign belongs to */,
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the creator running the campaign */,
  "launch_date" TEXT /* Date the campaign was launched */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the campaign will end */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the campaign (e.g., active, ended, canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaigns_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES campaign_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaigns_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("creator_id") REFERENCES creators ("creator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "creators" (
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each creator */,
  "creator_name" TEXT /* Full name of the creator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the creator */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the creator */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the creator */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the creator's social media profiles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("creator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "backers" (
  "backer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each backer */,
  "backer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the backer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the backer */,
  "total_pledged" REAL /* Total amount pledged by the backer across all campaigns */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the backer */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the backer's social media profiles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("backer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pledges" (
  "pledge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pledge */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign being pledged to */,
  "backer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the backer making the pledge */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount pledged */,
  "pledge_date" TEXT /* Date the pledge was made */,
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reward associated with the pledge */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pledge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pledges_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pledges_reward_id FOREIGN KEY ("reward_id") REFERENCES rewards ("reward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pledges_backer_id FOREIGN KEY ("backer_id") REFERENCES backers ("backer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign the update is for */,
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the creator posting the update */,
  "update_content" TEXT /* Content of the update */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the update was posted */,
  "update_type" TEXT /* Type of update (e.g., news, behind-the-scenes, thank-you) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_updates_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_updates_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("creator_id") REFERENCES creators ("creator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rewards" (
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reward */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign offering the reward */,
  "pledge_level" REAL /* Pledge level required to receive the reward */,
  "reward_description" TEXT /* Description of the reward */,
  "reward_limit" INTEGER /* Maximum number of rewards available */,
  "reward_estimated_delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated delivery date of the reward */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rewards_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "pledge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pledge related to the transaction */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date the transaction occurred */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., completed, refunded) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment used (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_pledge_id FOREIGN KEY ("pledge_id") REFERENCES pledges ("pledge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (if any) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES campaign_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_taggings" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id", "tag_id")
)
column_names: Total amount pledged to the campaign
